testcase.name: Search for a term
testcase.failure: java.lang.RuntimeException: Failed to initialize ChromeDriver at edu.eci.is.arcn.resources.steps.SearchSteps.setUp(SearchSteps.java:33) Caused by: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. testcase.system-out: Given I am on the Google search page........................................skipped When I search for "GitHub"..................................................skipped Then I should see "GitHub" in the results...................................skipped
